title: Donald Trump's children attend hush money trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump's sons Donald Jr. and Eric, daughter Tiffany and daughter-in-law Lara attended closing arguments of his hush money trial.

title: Judge rejects prosecution gag request in Trump's classified docs case
shortDescription: The judge in former President Donald Trump's classified documents case rejected a prosecution request to prohibit him from commenting on FBI agents.

title: 2 officers who defended the Capitol on Jan. 6 coming to AZ

title: Biden honors fallen soldiers for Memorial Day
shortDescription: President Joe Biden was joined by Vice President Kamala Harris at Arlington National Cemetery to honor the fallen soldiers who perished in battle.

title: Memory can 'reopen that black hole': Biden says at Memorial Day tribute
shortDescription: The president said while his son did not perish on the battlefield, it was a consequence of being in the army and working next to a burnfield.

title: Gen Z candidate will face off against indicted Trump fake elector
shortDescription: Ashwin Ramaswami, who has worked in the election security industry, is running for political office in Georgia against someone who was a fake elector for Trump.

title: Trump booed during speech to Libertarians
shortDescription: Donald Trump pitched a "partnership" with Libertarians during a speech at their national convention but heard boos from some in the crowd.

title: RFK Jr.'s cousin endorses Joe Biden for president
shortDescription: "There is no other choice than Joe Biden," Patrick Kennedy said, refusing to endorse his cousin, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., in his bid for the White House.

title: Violent threats against election officials are domestic terrorism, Arizona leader warns
shortDescription: "We have to also protect the people who protect democracy," Michigan Sec. Jocelyn Benson said.

title: Trump invited rappers facing felony gang charges on stage at Bronx rally
shortDescription: Trump eagerly embraced Sheff G and Sleepy Hallow, Brooklyn rappers accused of running a violent street gang. Both have gun convictions.

title: NH Senate passes bills to allow book banning, uncertified teachers
shortDescription: NH Senate passes bills that would ease book banning and allow uncertified part-time teachers in public schools.

title: In speech at West Point, Biden touts US commitment to Israel, Ukraine
shortDescription: The speech before graduating U.S. Army cadets is part of a push by Biden to highlight efforts to support active and retired military personnel.

title: Prosecutors ask judge to bar Trump from endangering law enforcement
shortDescription: Special Counsel Jack Smith said the request was necessary because of 'several intentionally false and inflammatory statements' made by Trump.

title: Trump's son-in-law meets with Arab Americans in Michigan
shortDescription: Arab American leaders gathered in Troy to hear former Ambassador Richard Grenell and Michael Boulos, a Trump son-in-law of Lebanese descent.
